nasb.text: The one who presents his offering shall present to the Lord a grain offering of one-tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with one-fourth of a hin of oil,

esv.text: then he who brings his offering shall offer to the Lord  a grain offering of a tenth of an ephah of fine flour, mixed with a quarter of a hin of oil;

cnv.text: 那獻供物的，要把一公斤細麵和一公斤油調和作素祭，獻給耶和華。

ccb.text: 献祭者要同时将一公斤细面粉调上一升油作素祭献给耶和华。
